name: Alaska Octopus Gumbo
recipeIngredient: 1 pint Fresh octopus, steamed until tender
recipeInstructions:
1. Boil diced bacon in water for 15 minutes.
2. Add the rest of the ingredients to the pot.
3. Simmer together for ten minutes.
4. Serve with warm cornbread. Serves four.
Note: Helen Blanchard, Ward Cove, AK
